add_library(FatFs STATIC
    Src/ff.c
    Src/diskio.c
    Src/ff_gen_drv.c
    Src/ffunicode.c
    Src/ffsystem.c
)

target_include_directories(FatFs PUBLIC Src)
target_link_libraries(FatFs PRIVATE stm32cubemx)

target_include_directories(FatFs PRIVATE 
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Core/Inc
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Middlewares/Third_Party/FreeRTOS/Source/CMSIS_RTOS_V2/Include
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Middlewares/Third_Party/FreeRTOS/Source/include
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Middlewares/Third_Party/FreeRTOS/Source/portable/GCC/ARM_CM33_NTZ/non_secure
)
